mapper.select: SELECT symbol, metric_date, pe_normalized_annual, pb_annual, roe_ttm, eps_ttm, week_52_high, week_52_low, raw_json, fetched_at FROM stock_metric_snapshot WHERE symbol = #{symbol} ORDER BY metric_date DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_metric_snapshot ( symbol, metric_date, pe_normalized_annual, pb_annual, roe_ttm, eps_ttm, week_52_high, week_52_low, raw_json, fetched_at ) VALUES ( #{symbol}, #{metricDate}, #{peNormalizedAnnual}, #{pbAnnual}, #{roeTtm}, #{epsTtm}, #{week52High}, #{week52Low}, #{rawJson}, #{fetchedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE pe_normalized_annual = VALUES(pe_normalized_annual), pb_annual = VALUES(pb_annual), roe_ttm = VALUES(roe_ttm), eps_ttm = VALUES(eps_ttm), week_52_high = VALUES(week_52_high), week_52_low = VALUES(week_52_low), raw_json = VALUES(raw_json), fetched_at = VALUES(fetched_at)
